## EXPERIENCE

**Machine Learning Engineer** July 2023 - Present

Sound Cloud *Berlin, Germany*

- Created track features and pipelines using **Big Query and Airflow** that resulting in an **increase of 10 min of listening time for 3 M users.**
- Created tool that allowed music teams to curate playlists and **select tracks from 300 million** using **SQL** and Looker.

**Machine Learning Engineer** May 2021 - June 2023

Jina AI *Berlin, Germany*

- Finetune LLMs on coding data, using **Lo RA and 8 bit Quantization** techniques on 3 3090 GPUs.
- Created Data for finetuning LLMs **using self-instruct, LIMA and self chat papers.**
- Developed a **multimodal search system using CLIP’s semantic representation for image and text**, replacing keyword-based search and eliminating tedious labelling for **100 k+ gifs** .
- Developed an information retrieval pipeline that parses technical documentation and created embeddings using

**Dense Passage Retrieval and Tf Idf**, Eliminating **60% of support workload** .

- Implemented a callback wrapper for **PyTorch, TensorFlow, and Paddle Paddle**, making the finetuner API easier to use for **250 monthly developers.**

https: //github.com/jina-ai/finetuner/pull/249, https: //github.com/jina-ai/finetuner/pull/266

**Data Scientist** Jan. 2021 – Oct. 2021

Relational AI *Berkeley, CA US*

- Pretrained **BERT from scratch** using **Nvidea Ne Mo and Pytorch Lightning on 4 V 100 GPUs for MLM and NSP tasks** . Trained on 12 GB of legal data, monitored using Tensorboard. Resulting in a better- performing named entity recognition model than legal BERT after finetuning with an average **94% F 1 score for entities** .
- Worked with a team of lawyers to annotate and clean data for named entity recognition using Prodigy labeling tool. Trained **spaCy NER models (CNN sliding window) and BiLSTM-CRF** to label more data and conducted error analysis and data enhancement. Resulted in a **4 x speed up in data labeling and improved quality** .

## Paper: https: //ieeexplore. ieee. org/abstract/document/10020873

**Artificial Intelligence R & amp; D Intern** July. 2020 – Sep. 2020 Vneuron *Tunis, TUN*

- Automated customer review analysis in English, French, Arabic, and Tunisian dialect, accelerating the process **from 1 week to 2 days** and improving customer support experience by finetuning a **Multilingual Distil- BERT model** for the Tunisian/Arabic dialect for sentiment classification with TensorFlow (98% accuracy).
- Improved model performance by **6%** by **scraping customer reviews from Google Maps using Selenium and Beautiful Soup**, providing more accurate customer satisfaction results.
- Deployed a Flask app to showcase the model’s performance and test manual examples, resulting in faster experimentation and debugging.

GitHub Repository: https: //github.com/azayz/Tunisian-Arabic-Dialect-Sentiment-Analysis Computer Vision Intern May. 2020 – July. 2020

Datavision *Tunis, TUN*

- Developed a mask detection model using **Efficient Det and Yolo-v 4**, calculating the percentage of masked vs unmasked people in public places and restaurants/coffees, enforcing COVID regulations for business owners.
- Developed an age and gender classification model **92% accuracy** by fine-tuning the **Efficient Net** architecture using AWS EC 2 instances and S 3 storage, helping business owners understand the customer demographic and finetune product placement quality resulting in **15% profit increase** .
- Optimized inference time by **20%** using **Tensor RT** and deployed the model using **Docker** and **TensorFlow Serving**, making predictions faster with a lighter model.
